onboarding.slide1Desc: Vela connects people based on deep psychological compatibility, not just looks.

register.heading: Create account
register.errorPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters

test.openSubtitle: Answer freely – there are no wrong answers
openQuestions: Describe your ideal relationship in a few sentences
What is absolutely unacceptable to you in a partner?
How do you picture everyday life as a couple – home, chores, personal space?
What are you looking for in a relationship that you haven't found yet?

3.text: In a new workplace or group, you usually:
3.A: Are one of the first to start conversations
3.B: Wait for someone to approach, but happily talk
3.D: Prefer working alone rather than in a group

4.B: General plan, details figured out on the spot
4.D: Prefer a tried-and-tested place I've been before

5.text: When you have a lot on your mind:
5.A: I make a list and tackle it point by point
5.C: I need alone time to sort my thoughts
5.D: I act on instinct – it works out somehow

6.text: How do you react to criticism?
6.A: I analyse whether it's valid and draw conclusions
6.B: It stings a bit, but I try to understand
6.C: I defend my stance if I'm confident I'm right
6.D: I dwell on it for a long time

7.D: Decide quickly and don't look back

8.text: How would you describe your approach to life?
8.A: I have clear goals and work towards them
8.B: I try to be present in the here and now
8.D: I search for meaning and deeper purpose

9.text: Do you want to have children?
9.C: I'm open to it, depends on my partner

10.text: The role of religion or spirituality in your life:
10.A: Faith is an important part of my life
10.B: I'm a spiritual person but not necessarily religious
10.C: I respect religion but don't practise myself
10.D: I'm an atheist – religion doesn't apply to me

16.text: In a relationship, you most need:
16.B: Space and mutual respect for independence
16.D: Stability and a sense of security

17.text: Your partner hasn't replied for a few hours. You:
17.A: Assume they're busy and wait calmly
17.B: Wonder a little but don't worry much
17.C: Start worrying if everything is OK

19.text: How do you most often show love?
19.A: Words – I say what I feel and appreciate them
19.B: Time – I'm present and give my full attention
19.C: Acts – I do things for my partner

20.text: How much time do you want to spend together vs apart?
20.A: Most of the time together, we love being close
20.B: Balance – together and apart in equal measure
20.C: Lots of independence, but quality shared time
20.D: Depends on the period and mood – flexible

24.A: I exercise regularly – sport is part of my life
24.B: I move when I feel like it, no pressure
24.C: I prefer gentle activities – walks, yoga
24.D: Not really – I prefer other forms of relaxation

26.A: Early bird – up early, fading by evening
26.B: Night owl – I come alive in the evening

27.text: Alcohol and going out in your life:
27.A: I enjoy going out and having fun
27.D: I don't drink and avoid parties

30.text: Where do you feel most at home:
30.A: A big city – I love the pace and opportunities
30.B: A medium city – balance between life and calm
30.C: Suburbs or small town – quiet and nature
30.D: I dream of living abroad or somewhere entirely different

personalityResult.whoLabel: Who are you in a relationship?
personalityResult.hint: You can retake the test at any time from your profile

INTJ.name: Architect
INTJ.desc: You see patterns where others see chaos. Your independent thinking and strategic approach to life make you an exceptional partner for someone who values depth and intellectual closeness.

INTP.name: Logician
INTP.desc: Your mind endlessly seeks answers to questions others never even ask. You value freedom of thought and seek a partner with whom you can explore ideas without limits.

ENTJ.name: Commander
ENTJ.desc: A natural leader with vision and the energy to realise it. In a relationship you seek someone equally ambitious who isn't afraid of challenges and shares your drive to grow.

ENTP.name: Debater
ENTP.desc: Your mind works like an idea generator – quick, creative, always ready for a new perspective. You thrive with someone who isn't afraid of intellectual sparring.

INFJ.name: Advocate
INFJ.desc: A rare type – simultaneously a dreamer and a realist with exceptional emotional depth. Your relationships are always authentic and meaningful because you don't accept superficiality.

INFP.name: Mediator
INFP.desc: An idealist with a rich inner world and great empathy. You seek connection at the level of values – someone with whom you can be fully yourself.

ENFJ.name: Protagonist
ENFJ.desc: Charismatic and empathetic – you inspire others simply by your presence. Your relationships are built on mutual growth and truly deep understanding.

ENFP.name: Campaigner
ENFP.desc: An enthusiastic free spirit who sees potential in every person. Your authenticity and energy attract – in a relationship you seek a real spark and mutual inspiration.

ISTJ.name: Logistician
ISTJ.desc: Reliable and responsible – when you make a promise, you keep it. In a relationship you are a pillar of stability and loyalty that others can always count on.

ISFJ.name: Defender
ISFJ.desc: Warm and caring, you always remember what matters to those close to you. Your love is expressed in small everyday gestures that build genuine security.

ESTJ.name: Executive
ESTJ.desc: Organised and direct – you know what you want and how to achieve it. In a relationship you value clear rules, mutual respect and building a stable future together.

ESFJ.name: Consul
ESFJ.desc: Your heart is open to others and you draw energy from creating harmony around you. Relationships are the most important thing to you – you give everything to those you love.

ISTP.name: Virtuoso
ISTP.desc: A calm observer who acts when needed – with precision and composure. You value independence and seek a partner who understands your need for space.

ISFP.name: Adventurer
ISFP.desc: A sensitive artist living in the moment, who notices beauty where others miss it. Your spontaneity and authenticity make every moment with you special.

ESTP.name: Entrepreneur
ESTP.desc: Energy, charisma and a love of action – life with you is a constant adventure. You seek someone who can keep up with your pace and shares your love of living intensely.

ESFP.name: Entertainer
ESFP.desc: Spontaneous and full of life – wherever you are, something is always happening. You seek someone who shares your enthusiasm for life and isn't afraid to dance in the rain.

completeProfile.pageSub: Last step before we find your matches ✨

photos.title: Photos
photos.hint: The first photo will be your avatar. You can add up to 3.

bio.title: About me
bio.placeholder: Write a few words about yourself – what drives you, what you're looking for, what makes you unique...

profileQ.title: Profile questions

status.title: Status
childrenOptions: Yes – they don't live with me

lookingFor.title: What I'm looking for
typeOptions: Open to getting to know each other
paceOptions: I prefer chatting a long time before meeting
I prefer meeting for coffee quickly

save.hint: To continue, add a photo, city and bio

profileQuestions: What would you do on the perfect Saturday?
A typical evening at home for me looks like...
Something I can't imagine a day without...
The last thing that surprised me...

settings.title: Settings
settings.minCompatHint: Show only people with a score ≥ %{n}%
settings.pauseHint: Hides your profile from other users

pwd.title: Change password
pwd.errLength: New password must be at least 8 characters

insights.attachmentGood: You have very similar attachment styles – a strong foundation for a lasting relationship.
insights.attachmentBad: Your attachment styles differ – this may lead to emotional tension.
insights.intimacyDiff: You differ in your need for closeness – worth discussing early on.
insights.orgSimilar: Similar approach to organisation – this eliminates many everyday conflicts.
insights.dealbreaker: Note: one of your boundaries may not be met by this person.
insights.visionGood: You share a similar vision of an ideal relationship.
insights.valuesGood: Your values and lifestyle are very well aligned.
insights.neuroSimilar: Similar emotional sensitivity – you'll find it easier to understand each other.
insights.childrenBlock: A fundamental incompatibility on the topic of children makes a relationship unlikely.
